pr.title: (0.8822 BPB mean) Medusa: Unstable S2 — DeltaNet Crawler, Legal  10mb. .77bpb single seed.

output.summary: DeltaNet crawler loops combine with loop-aware GPTQ and GPTQ_RESERVE_MS timing to keep int6 calibration inside the 600s cap.
techniques: Loop-aware 2-phase GPTQ with GPTQ_RESERVE_MS to finish calibration within the budget
